name: waterheater-vault
description: AI Water Heater Scanner for Homeowners & Pros — free 60-second scan, SaaS pro platform.

scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 execute waterheater-vault --local --file=migrations/archive/0001_auth_sync.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute waterheater-vault --local --file=migrations/0010_scan_images.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute waterheater-vault --local --file=migrations/0012_r2_upgrade.sql
scripts.dev:pages: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev out --compatibility-date=2024-01-01
